# defectdojo_user (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo User

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_user" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) The email address of the User
- `first_name` (String) The first name of the User
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether this user account is active
- `is_superuser` (Boolean) Whether this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them
- `last_name` (String) The last name of the User
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the User (not returned by API)
- `username` (String) The username of the User
